channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Netanyahu Affirms Alignment of Israeli and US Goals Regarding Iran Conflict
item.description: Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu, in a statement released on Wednesday (April 15, 2026), has underscored a significant alignment in objectives between Israel and the United States concerning ...

item.description: Police in Embu county have expressed regret following the shooting deaths of two protesters during a demonstration at Ishiara Level 4 Hospital, with the death toll rising to three after another injure...

item.title: Farmtech launches Sunwoda Energy solar storage solutions in Nigeria
item.description: Farmtech Integrated Services don officially bring Sunwoda Energy battery storage systems enter Nigerian market. Dis move dey aimed to help fix Nigeria wahala for power, where unreliable grid don dey h...

item.title: Parliamentary Committee Debates MAID for Mental Illness Amidst Political Shifts
item.description: On April 15, 2026, several key issues dominated Canadian news. A parliamentary committee meeting on medical assistance in dying (MAID) highlighted a division among experts over whether MAID should be ...

item.title: Atiku Abubakar Confirms 2027 Presidential Election Will Be His Last Bid
item.description: Former Vice-President Atiku Abubakar don talk say the 2027 general election go be him last chance to try become Nigeria president. Atiku, wey go don reach 80 years old by dat time, yan this one during...

item.title: Tondo Fire Leaves 300 Families Homeless
item.description: A devastating fire broke out in Tondo, Manila, leaving approximately 300 families without a place to call home. The blaze, which erupted on April 16, 2026, quickly engulfed residential areas, forcing ...

item.title: Chinese community programmes offer beef rewards for weight loss
item.description: In eastern China, residents are participating in an unusual weight-loss initiative called 'Trade Fat for Beef,' where every half kilogram of weight lost earns the participant an equivalent amount of b...

item.title: Police Arrest 23 After Violence During Ambedkar Jayanti Procession in Kasganj
item.description: On April 14, 2026, in Chehka Gunar village of Kasganj district, Uttar Pradesh, violence broke out during the celebration of Dr. B.R. Ambedkar’s birth anniversary. A procession organised by the Dalit c...

item.title: Calabarzon sees 50% drop in local ordinance violators after Safer Cities campaign launch
item.description: In just one week following the launch of the Safer Cities campaign in Calabarzon, the number of individuals violating local ordinances has dropped by nearly 54%, according to the Philippine National P...

item.title: Undercover RCMP officer recounts genuine friendship with Dean Penney during staged operation
item.description: During the ongoing trial of Dean Penney in Corner Brook, an undercover RCMP officer, known only as Vic, testified about the unique relationship he developed with Penney over more than four years. Task...

item.description: Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif met Saudi Crown Prince Mohammed bin Salman in Jeddah on Wednesday, marking the beginning of his official regional tour aimed at deepening Pakistan’s diplomatic and econom...

item.title: Rising Sea Levels and Salty Water May Increase Blood Pressure Risk
item.description: A concerning new study reveals a potential link between saltwater intrusion into freshwater sources and increased blood pressure, particularly impacting individuals in coastal regions. Researchers, an...

item.title: Governor Uba Sani Releases Over N4 Billion for Pensioners in Kaduna State
